notes: Compatibility pass over vehicle-key and garage scripts. Keys now auto-detect qbx_vehiclekeys, qb-vehiclekeys, wasabi_carlock, qs-vehiclekeys, Renewed-Vehiclekeys, MrNewbVehicleKeys, mk_vehiclekeys, t1ger_keys, jaksam vehicles_keys, F_RealCarKeysSystem and cd_garage built-in keys (t1ger/jaksam/qs were using wrong or outdated APIs before). Test drives grant temporary keys and revoke them at the end; the keys hand-off is server-validated against plate ownership. Garage insert additionally fills cd_garage's in_garage column, re-syncs jaksam's owned-keys cache after buy/finance/repo/sell, and adds a Config.Garage.ExtraColumns escape hatch for exotic routing columns.
